title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident A
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Morning...

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident B
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey! Did you see the Twinkle Monthly
yesterday?!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident A
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, it's a little early to be shouting... Did they
write about something interesting?

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident B
text_block_list.text:
Quit dragging your feet already! You have to see
this! It's the popularity poll for the Japanese
Derby!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident B
text_block_list.text: Look, for the first time, Ayabe got—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Second place...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: First place is...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Narita Top Road.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Whew...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: All right!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I can't let everyone down! I have to show them my
dream at the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: ...Yaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Opera O's in front, Ayabe's behind... Stay
calm—don't charge ahead in the beginning! Hold
your place just a little behind the middle of the
pack...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Then mid-race... slowly start pushing forward, but
conserve your energy. Don't go all out yet...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
The fourth corner! Time for my last spurt! Ayabe
falls further behind, I start overtaking Opera O!
Then...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I finish first!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (She sure is passionate...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (The light she exudes... It... burns.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh... Ummm! H-hey, Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hm? Special Week... Do you need something?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Well, um... Actually, here! This is for you!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Rice balls?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! My mom taught me how to make them real
big!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I change the ingredients based on where I'm at.
This time, I used salmon, bonito flakes, and
wasabi.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hold on... Why for me?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, well... hehe... I did worry I might be intruding,
but...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We talked here before the Satsuki Sho,
remember?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You seemed really down at the time, and you
hadn't been eating anything.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But when I watched you on TV in my dorm, you
seemed so alive in the race!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So... I thought... I might as well!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You might as well?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yup.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I'm competing against Grass, El, Sei,
and King, I find it's better to do it with a full
stomach.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
After all, I want everyone to compete with
everything they've got—including me!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Compete... with everything I've got...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chomp...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...This is good.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Japanese Derby just moments away,
Admire Vega seems to be in good shape!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she's up against Narita Top Road, who, for
the first time, took first place in the popularity
poll.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And T.M. Opera O, who performed incredibly well
in the Satsuki Sho, also looks to be in top form.
choice_data_list: Think you can do it, Ayabe?
Think you can do it, Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm going to win.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Oh! Um... Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I look forward to running with you today!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Let's give it our best shot.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hmm... You've a new look in your eyes, Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Spandendo, spandendo! More energy! More
power!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh, what a brilliant tune!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The once-in-a-lifetime Japanese Derby is about
to begin.
